creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
On Mon, 31 May 1999 20:00:05 +0200, Arjan de Vet wrote:

> Then FreeBSD 3.2-release has a whacky shell :-).

Perhaps, but since neither David nor I can reproduce the problem, that's
difficult to investigate. :-)

Also, I'm inclined to believe something's screwed up over there, because
of your comments from another message:

> Your patch was for an older version I guess but after making this
> change to the configure script:

My patch wasn't for an old version. It was for the port as it was when
I mailed and as it still is now. This is why I think there's something
wrong on your end. I think there may be breakage in your ports tree / Mk
files / environment.

Anyway, now you know how to make it work for you, and it seems to work
for the rest of us too.

Ciao,
Sheldon.
